series_metadata.series_description: Contains information pertaining to ITV feed schedule including copies of shipping orders, videotape fault reports, correspondence, individual stations' broadcast schedules, current broadcast schedule information from PBS and CEN, and contracts for lease of ITV programs. Contracts here mean copies where Dept.of Education is leasing agent and originals when OETNC is leasing agent. These must be renewed by leasee every year.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current and one previous fiscal year
